$schema-note: Reference only. Brand is being fully reset. Use this to mirror the structure in the new tokens JSON — same key names, new values. Source: src/app/globals.css lines 7-208.

semantic-meaning.accent: Primary brand / info — currently steel blue
semantic-meaning.success: OSHA safe / go / complete / received / passed
semantic-meaning.danger: OSHA danger / stop / critical blocking issue
semantic-meaning.purple: Non-semantic accent for routing/categorization (never an OSHA alarm)
semantic-meaning.field: Install-type indicator — field install, kept distinct from OSHA warning (bug-fix: see globals.css:76-82)
semantic-meaning.bench: Install-type indicator — bench install, kept distinct from OSHA routing purple

font.mono: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace

elevation.note: Glows are the current signature elevation language. Light mode suppresses them (see globals.css:398-421). A new elevation system is expected.

performance-tiers.note: Accessibility-adjacent feature that must survive. data-perf='low' disables glows + animations; data-perf='mid' keeps static decorations but disables animations; prefers-reduced-motion overrides everything.
